    have : k ≤ 8 := Nat.le_of_lt_succ h
    have : g k ≤ 96 := by dsimp [g]; nlinarith
    linarith
  have h_fk : f k ≤ n := by
    by_cases h : k = 9
    · rw [h]; dsimp [f]; norm_num; linarith
    · have : k ≥ 10 := by omega
      have minimality : ¬ (n ≤ g (k - 1)) := Nat.find_min h_exists (Nat.pred_lt (by linarith))
      push_neg at minimality
      have overlap : g (k - 1) + 1 ≥ f k := by dsimp [f, g]; nlinarith
      linarith
  let a := 2 * k^2 + 1
  let b := 2 * k^2 - 4 * k
  let c := 2 * k^2 + 4 * k
  have ha : a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]; constructor
    · calc n ≤ b := h_gk
           _ ≤ a := by dsimp [a, b]; nlinarith
    · calc a ≤ c := by dsimp [a, c]; nlinarith
           _ ≤ 2 * f k := by dsimp [c, f]; nlinarith
           _ ≤ 2 * n := by linarith
  have hb : b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]; constructor; exact h_gk
    calc b ≤ a := by dsimp [a, b]; nlinarith
         _ ≤ 2 * n := (Finset.mem_Icc.1 ha).2
  have hc : c ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]; constructor
    calc n ≤ a := (Finset.mem_Icc.1 ha).1
         _ ≤ c := by dsimp [a, c]; nlinarith
    calc c ≤ 2 * f k := by dsimp [c, f]; nlinarith
         _ ≤ 2 * n := by linarith
  have sq1 : IsSquare (a + b) := by
    use 2 * k - 1; dsimp [a, b]; zify [hk9]; ring
  have sq2 : IsSquare (b + c) := by use 2 * k; dsimp [b, c]; ring
  have sq3 : IsSquare (c + a) := by use 2 * k + 1; dsimp [c, a]; ring
  by_cases h : ({a, b} ⊆ S ∨ {b, c} ⊆ S ∨ {c, a} ⊆ S)

    · use a, h (by simp), b, h (by simp); exact ⟨by dsimp[a,b]; linarith, sq1⟩
    · use b, h (by simp), c, h (by simp); exact ⟨by dsimp[b,c]; linarith, sq2⟩

let m := Nat.sqrt (2 * n)

           else if (m + 2)^2 - 2 * (m + 2) - 3 ≥ 2 * n then m + 2
           else m + 4

    dsimp [k]; split_ifs <;> simp only [Nat.add_mod, Nat.mul_mod, *] <;> rfl
  -- Vertices of the triangle

  let a := (u^2 - v^2 + w^2) / 2
  let b := (u^2 + v^2 - w^2) / 2

  -- Proof that sums are squares

    dsimp [a, b, c, u, v, w]
    have h : v^2 + w^2 ≥ u^2 := by

    have h2 : u^2 + v^2 ≥ w^2 := by

    have h2 : v^2 + w^2 ≥ u^2 := by nlinarith [Nat.sqrt_le_self (2*n)]
    omega
  have hc_sum : a + b = u^2 := by

    have h : u^2 + v^2 ≥ w^2 := by nlinarith [Nat.sqrt_le_self (2*n)]
    have h2 : u^2 + w^2 ≥ v^2 := by nlinarith
    omega

    dsimp [b, c, u, v, w]
    have hm_le : m^2 ≤ 2 * n := Nat.sqrt_le_self (2 * n)
    have hn_lower : 200 ≤ 2 * n := by linarith
    have hm_14 : 14 ≤ m := Nat.le_sqrt.mpr (by linarith)
    dsimp [k]
    split_ifs with h_even h_cond
    · -- m even, k = m + 3
      constructor
      · nlinarith
      · have : 4 * n ≥ m^2 + 14 * m + 45 := by
          -- 4n >= 2m^2. Need 2m^2 >= m^2 + 14m + 45 <=> m^2 - 14m - 45 >= 0.
          -- Roots at ~16.7. For m=14 fails?
          -- Wait, for m=14 (n=100..112), 4n >= 400.

          -- Direct check for m=14:

    · -- m odd, k = m + 2

      · exact h_cond

    · -- m odd, k = m + 4

      · nlinarith
      · -- Used only if 2n > (m+2)^2 - 2(m+2) - 3
        -- This implies n is large enough for the upper bound
        nlinarith

    · have : a < c := by dsimp [a,c,u,v,w]; nlinarith

  have hb_in : b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    constructor
    · exact h_bounds.1
    · have : b < c := by dsimp [b,c,u,v,w]; nlinarith

  have hc_in : c ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    constructor
    · have : b < c := by dsimp [b,c,u,v,w]; nlinarith
      linarith [h_bounds.1]
    · exact h_bounds.2

  have h_diff : a ≠ b ∧ b ≠ c ∧ a ≠ c := by
    dsimp [a,b,c,u,v,w]; constructor <;> try constructor <;> nlinarith
    
  -- Graph coloring logic
  by_cases ha : a ∈ S
  · by_cases hb : b ∈ S
    · left; use a, ha, b, hb, h_diff.1; rw [hc_sum]; exact ⟨u, rfl⟩
    · by_cases hc : c ∈ S
      · left; use c, hc, a, ha, h_diff.2.2.symm; rw [hb_sum]; exact ⟨w, rfl⟩
      · right; use b; constructor; exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hb_in, hb⟩
        use c; constructor; exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hc_in, hc⟩

  · right; use a; constructor; exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨ha_in, ha⟩
    by_cases hb : b ∈ S
    · by_cases hc : c ∈ S
      · left; use b, hb, c, hc, h_diff.2.1; rw [ha_sum]; exact ⟨v, rfl⟩
      · use c; constructor; exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hc_in, hc⟩
        use h_diff.2.2; rw [hb_sum]; exact ⟨w, rfl⟩
    · use b; constructor; exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hb_in, hb⟩
      use h_diff.1; rw [hc_sum]; exact ⟨u, rfl⟩

    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]
    constructor
    dsimp [b, a]; linarith
    dsimp [b, c]; linarith

  have hc_mem : c ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]
    constructor
    dsimp [c, a]; linarith
    exact hc_le_2n

  have hab_ne : a ≠ b := by dsimp [a, b]; linarith
  have hbc_ne : b ≠ c := by dsimp [b, c]; linarith
  have hca_ne : c ≠ a := by dsimp [c, a]; linarith

  by_cases hab : a ∈ S ∧ b ∈ S
  · left; use a, hab.1, b, hab.2; exact ⟨hab_ne, ha_sq⟩
  by_cases hbc : b ∈ S ∧ c ∈ S
  · left; use b, hbc.1, c, hbc.2; exact ⟨hbc_ne, hb_sq⟩
  by_cases hca : c ∈ S ∧ a ∈ S
  · left; use c, hca.1, a, hca.2; exact ⟨hca_ne, hc_sq⟩

  right
  rcases em (a ∈ S) with ha | ha
  · have hb : b ∉ S := fun h => hab ⟨ha, h⟩
    have hc : c ∉ S := fun h => hca ⟨h, ha⟩
    use b, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hb_mem, hb⟩), c, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hc_mem, hc⟩)
    exact ⟨hbc_ne, hb_sq⟩
  · rcases em (b ∈ S) with hb | hb
    · have hc : c ∉ S := fun h => hbc ⟨hb, h⟩
      use a, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨ha_mem, ha⟩), c, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hc_mem, hc⟩)
      exact ⟨hca_ne.symm, hc_sq⟩
    · use a, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨ha_mem, ha⟩), b, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hb_mem, hb⟩)
      exact ⟨hab_ne, ha_sq⟩

let g (m : ℕ) := (m ^ 2 + 6 * m + 5) / 2
  let P (m : ℕ) := Odd m ∧ g m ≤ 2 * n
  let k := Nat.findGreatest P (2 * n)
  have hP17 : P 17 := ⟨by use 8; rfl, by dsimp [g]; linarith⟩
  have hk_ge : 17 ≤ k := Nat.le_findGreatest (by dsimp [g]; linarith) hP17
  have hk : Odd k ∧ g k ≤ 2 * n := Nat.findGreatest_spec (Nat.findGreatest_of_true hP17 (by dsimp [g]; linarith))
  
  let a := (k ^ 2 - 2 * k - 3) / 2
  let b := (k ^ 2 + 2 * k + 3) / 2
  let c := g k

  have ha_eq : 2 * a = k ^ 2 - 2 * k - 3 := by
    dsimp [a]; rw [Nat.div_mul_cancel]; rcases hk.1 with ⟨m, rfl⟩; ring_nf; apply dvd_mul_right
  have hb_eq : 2 * b = k ^ 2 + 2 * k + 3 := by
    dsimp [b]; rw [Nat.div_mul_cancel]; rcases hk.1 with ⟨m, rfl⟩; ring_nf; apply dvd_mul_right
  have hc_eq : 2 * c = k ^ 2 + 6 * k + 5 := by
    dsimp [c, g]; rw [Nat.div_mul_cancel]; rcases hk.1 with ⟨m, rfl⟩; use 2*m^2+8*m+7; ring

  have h_range : n ≤ a ∧ c ≤ 2 * n := by
    refine ⟨?, hk.2⟩
    by_contra h; push_neg at h
    let k' := k + 2
    have hk' : P k' := by
      refine ⟨by rcases hk.1 with ⟨m, rfl⟩; use m + 1; ring, ?_⟩
      by_contra hg; push_neg at hg
      have : 2 * (2 * a) < 2 * g k' := by
        dsimp [g]; rw [Nat.div_mul_cancel]
        · nlinarith
        · rcases hk.1 with ⟨m, rfl⟩; use 2*m^2+8*m+7; ring
      rw [ha_eq] at this
      rw [show k' = k + 2 by rfl] at this
      dsimp [g] at this; rw [Nat.div_mul_cancel] at this
      · nlinarith
      · rcases hk.1 with ⟨m, rfl⟩; use 2*(m+1)^2+8*(m+1)+7; ring
    have := Nat.findGreatest_is_greatest (m := 2 * n) k' (by dsimp [g]; nlinarith) hk'
    linarith

  have hab : IsSquare (a + b) := ⟨k, by apply Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (by norm_num : 0 < 2); rw [Nat.mul_add, ha_eq, hb_eq]; ring⟩
  have hbc : IsSquare (b + c) := ⟨k + 2, by apply Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (by norm_num : 0 < 2); rw [Nat.mul_add, hb_eq, hc_eq]; ring⟩
  have hca : IsSquare (c + a) := ⟨k + 1, by apply Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (by norm_num : 0 < 2); rw [Nat.mul_add, hc_eq, ha_eq]; ring⟩

  have h_distinct : a < b ∧ b < c := by
    rw [← Nat.mul_lt_mul_left (by norm_num : 0 < 2), ha_eq, hb_eq, hc_eq]
    constructor <;> nlinarith

  let T : Finset ℕ := {a, b, c}
  have hT : T ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    intro x hx; simp at hx
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl
    · exact Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ⟨h_range.1, by linarith [h_distinct.1, h_distinct.2, h_range.2]⟩
    · exact Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ⟨by linarith [h_range.1, h_distinct.1], by linarith [h_distinct.2, h_range.2]⟩
    · exact Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ⟨by linarith [h_range.1, h_distinct.1, h_distinct.2], h_range.2⟩

  by_cases h : (T ∩ S).card ≥ 2
  · obtain ⟨x, hx, y, hy, hxy⟩ := Finset.one_lt_card_iff.mp h
    left; use x, (Finset.mem_inter.mp hx).2, y, (Finset.mem_inter.mp hy).2, hxy
    have hxT := (Finset.mem_inter.mp hx).1; have hyT := (Finset.mem_inter.mp hy).1
    simp at hxT hyT
    rcases hxT with rfl | rfl | rfl <;> rcases hyT with rfl | rfl | rfl
    all_goals { exact hab <|> exact hbc <|> exact hca <|> exact IsSquare.symm hab <|> exact IsSquare.symm hbc <|> exact IsSquare.symm hca <|> contradiction }
  · have : (T \ S).card ≥ 2 := by
       rw [Finset.card_sdiff (Finset.inter_subset_left _ _)]
       have : T.card = 3 := by
         dsimp [T]; rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem, Finset.card_singleton]
         all_goals { simp; linarith [h_distinct.1, h_distinct.2] }
       linarith
    obtain ⟨x, hx, y, hy, hxy⟩ := Finset.one_lt_card_iff.mp this
    right; use x, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1, y, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hy).1
    use hxy
    have hxT := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1; have hyT := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hy).1
    simp at hxT hyT
    rcases hxT with rfl | rfl | rfl <;> rcases hyT with rfl | rfl | rfl
    all_goals { exact hab <|> exact hbc <|> exact hca <|> exact IsSquare.symm hab <|> exact IsSquare.symm hbc <|> exact IsSquare.symm hca <|> contradiction }

let m := (2 * n + 4).sqrt
  let k := if m % 2 = 1 then m + 2 else m + 3
  have hk_odd : k % 2 = 1 := by
    dsimp [k]; split_ifs with h
    · rw [Nat.add_mod, h]; rfl
    · rw [Nat.add_mod, Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero h)]; rfl
  have h_low : 2 * n + 4 ≤ (k - 1) ^ 2 := by
    dsimp [k]; split_ifs with h
    · exact Nat.lt_succ_sqrt (2 * n + 4)
    · exact le_trans (Nat.lt_succ_sqrt _) (Nat.pow_le_pow_left (by decide) (Nat.le_succ _))
  have h_high : (k + 3) ^ 2 ≤ 4 * n + 4 := by
    have hm : m ≤ (2 * n + 4).sqrt := le_rfl
    -- (m+6)^2 <= 4n+4 holds for n >= 100.
    -- At n=100, m=14, 20^2=400 <= 404.
    -- For m >= 15 (n >= 111), (m+6)^2 <= 2m^2 - 4 <= 4n+4 is easy.
    -- We assume nlinarith handles this or similar bounds.
    dsimp [k]; split_ifs <;> zify at * <;> nlinarith
  let a := (k ^ 2 - 2 * k - 3) / 2
  let b := (k ^ 2 + 6 * k + 5) / 2
  let c := (k ^ 2 + 2 * k + 3) / 2
  have ha : 2 * a = k ^ 2 - 2 * k - 3 := by
    have : 2 ∣ k ^ 2 - 2 * k - 3 := by zify [hk_odd]; simp; ring
    rw [Nat.div_mul_cancel this]
  have hb : 2 * b = k ^ 2 + 6 * k + 5 := by
    have : 2 ∣ k ^ 2 + 6 * k + 5 := by zify [hk_odd]; simp; ring
    rw [Nat.div_mul_cancel this]
  have hc : 2 * c = k ^ 2 + 2 * k + 3 := by
    have : 2 ∣ k ^ 2 + 2 * k + 3 := by zify [hk_odd]; simp; ring
    rw [Nat.div_mul_cancel this]
  let T : Finset ℕ := {a, b, c}
  have hT_sub : T ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    intro x hx; simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl <;> rw [Finset.mem_Icc] <;> zify [ha, hb, hc, h_low, h_high] at * <;> constructor <;> linarith
  have hab : IsSquare (a + b) := by use k + 1; zify [ha, hb]; ring
  have hbc : IsSquare (b + c) := by use k + 2; zify [hb, hc]; ring
  have hca : IsSquare (c + a) := by use k; zify [hc, ha]; ring
  have h_distinct : a ≠ b ∧ b ≠ c ∧ a ≠ c := by zify [ha, hb, hc] at *; constructor <;> constructor <;> linarith
  by_cases h : (T ∩ S).card ≥ 2
  · obtain ⟨x, y, hx, hy, hne⟩ := Finset.one_lt_card_iff.1 h
    rw [Finset.mem_inter] at hx hy
    left; use x, hx.2, y, hy.2, hne
    revert hx hy; simp [T]; intros; subst_vars
    try (exact hab); try (exact hbc); try (exact hca)
    try (rw [add_comm]; exact hab); try (rw [add_comm]; exact hbc); try (rw [add_comm]; exact hca)
  · right
    have : (T \ S).card ≥ 2 := by
      rw [Finset.card_sdiff (Finset.inter_subset_left _ _), (by simp [T, h_distinct] : T.card = 3)]
      linarith
    obtain ⟨x, y, hx, hy, hne⟩ := Finset.one_lt_card_iff.1 this
    use x, (Finset.mem_sdiff.1 hx).1, y, (Finset.mem_sdiff.1 hy).1, hne
    rw [Finset.mem_sdiff] at hx hy
    revert hx hy; simp [T]; intros; subst_vars
    try (exact hab); try (exact hbc); try (exact hca)
    try (rw [add_comm]; exact hab); try (rw [add_comm]; exact hbc); try (rw [add_comm]; exact hca)

let m := (n + 1).sqrt - 1
  have hm : 9 ≤ m := by
    rw [Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le (Nat.sqrt_pos.2 (by linarith)).le]
    apply Nat.le_sqrt.2
    linarith
  let x := 2 * m ^ 2 + 1
  let y := 2 * m ^ 2 - 4 * m
  let z := 2 * m ^ 2 + 4 * m
  have h_order : y < x ∧ x < z := by
    constructor
    · apply Nat.sub_lt_add_of_pos <;> linarith
    · apply Nat.add_lt_add_left; linarith
  have h_bound : n ≤ y ∧ z ≤ 2 * n := by
    have h_sqrt := Nat.sqrt_le (n + 1)
    have h_succ := Nat.lt_succ_sqrt (n + 1)
    have h_eq : m + 1 = (n + 1).sqrt := Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.sqrt_pos.2 (by linarith)).le
    rw [← h_eq] at h_sqrt h_succ
    constructor
    · zify at h_succ ⊢
      have : (m:ℤ)^2 - 8*m - 3 ≥ 0 := by
        have : (m:ℤ) ≥ 9 := Int.ofNat_le_ofNat_of_le hm
        nlinarith
      linarith [h_succ]
    · zify at h_sqrt ⊢
      linarith [h_sqrt]
  have sq_xy : IsSquare (x + y) := ⟨2 * m - 1, by zify; ring_nf; have : 2*(m:ℤ)^2+1 + (2*m^2-4*m) = (2*m-1)^2 := by ring; exact this⟩
  have sq_yz : IsSquare (y + z) := ⟨2 * m, by zify; ring⟩
  have sq_zx : IsSquare (z + x) := ⟨2 * m + 1, by zify; ring⟩

  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  rcases h with ⟨hS, hSc⟩
  have mem_Icc : ∀ v ∈ ({x, y, z} : Finset ℕ), v ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    intro v hv
    simp at hv
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]
    rcases hv with rfl | rfl | rfl
    · constructor <;> linarith [h_bound.1, h_bound.2, h_order.1, h_order.2]
    · constructor <;> linarith [h_bound.1, h_bound.2, h_order.1]
    · constructor <;> linarith [h_bound.1, h_bound.2, h_order.2]

  let mem (v : ℕ) : Prop := v ∈ S
  have edge : ∀ u v, u ∈ ({x, y, z} : Finset ℕ) → v ∈ ({x, y, z} : Finset ℕ) → u ≠ v → IsSquare (u + v) → (mem u ↔ ¬ mem v) := by
    intro u v hu hv hneq hsq
    by_contra h_iff
    rw [iff_not, ← iff_iff_not_iff_not] at h_iff
    by_cases huS : mem u
    · have hvS : mem v := h_iff.1 huS
      exact hS u huS v hvS hneq hsq
    · have huSc : u ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, mem_Icc u hu, huS]
      have hvSc : v ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, mem_Icc v hv, h_iff.2 (by assumption)]
      exact hSc u huSc v hvSc hneq hsq

  have hxy := edge x y (by simp) (by simp) (ne_of_gt h_order.1) sq_xy
  have hyz := edge y z (by simp) (by simp) (ne_of_lt h_order.2) sq_yz
  have hzx := edge z x (by simp) (by simp) (ne_of_gt (lt_trans h_order.1 h_order.2)) sq_zx
  rw [iff_not] at hxy hyz hzx
  tauto

by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  rcases h with ⟨hS_indep, hNS_indep⟩
  let P (m : ℕ) := 19 ≤ m ∧ m % 2 = 1 ∧ 2 * n ≤ m^2 - 6 * m + 5
  have hP : ∃ m, P m := ⟨2 * n + 19, by
    refine ⟨by linarith, ?_, by nlinarith⟩
    rw [Nat.add_mod, Nat.mul_mod_right, Nat.zero_add]; rfl⟩
  let k := Nat.find hP
  have hk : P k := Nat.find_spec hP
  have hmin : ∀ m < k, ¬ P m := Nat.find_min hP
  rcases hk with ⟨k_ge, k_odd, hc_le⟩
  let a := (k^2 - 2 * k + 3) / 2
  let b := (k^2 + 2 * k - 3) / 2
  let c := (k^2 - 6 * k + 5) / 2
  have h2 : 2 * a = k^2 - 2 * k + 3 ∧ 2 * b = k^2 + 2 * k - 3 ∧ 2 * c = k^2 - 6 * k + 5 := by
    have : k^2 % 2 = 1 := by rw [Nat.pow_two, Nat.mul_mod, k_odd]; rfl
    repeat' constructor <;> apply Nat.div_mul_cancel <;>
      { rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, ← Nat.add_sub_assoc (by nlinarith), Nat.add_mod, Nat.sub_mod] <;>
        simp [k_odd, this] <;> try rfl }
  rcases h2 with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  have h_ord : c < a ∧ a < b := by constructor <;> linarith
  have h_rg : n ≤ c ∧ b ≤ 2 * n := by
    constructor; · linarith
    by_cases h19 : k = 19
    · rw [h19] at hb; linarith
    · have k_ge_21 : 21 ≤ k := by
        have : k ≠ 19 := h19; have : k ≥ 19 := k_ge;
        have : k % 2 = 1 := k_odd
        zify at *; linarith
      have : (k - 2)^2 - 6 * (k - 2) + 5 < 2 * n := by
        by_contra H
        apply hmin (k - 2) (by linarith)
        refine ⟨by linarith, by simp [Nat.sub_mod, k_odd], H⟩
      linarith [show k^2 - 18 * k + 5 ≥ 0 by nlinarith]
  have hab : IsSquare (a + b) := ⟨k, by linarith⟩
  have hbc : IsSquare (b + c) := ⟨k - 1, by nlinarith⟩
  have hca : IsSquare (c + a) := ⟨k - 2, by nlinarith⟩
  let T := {a, b, c}
  have hT : T ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    intro x hx; simp at hx
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl <;>
    { rw [Finset.mem_Icc]; constructor <;> linarith [h_rg.1, h_rg.2, h_ord.1, h_ord.2] }
  have h_col : ∀ x ∈ T, x ∈ S ∨ x ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S :=
    fun x hx => by by_cases h : x ∈ S; left; exact h; right; exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hT hx, h⟩
  rcases h_col a (by simp) with ha | ha <;> rcases h_col b (by simp) with hb | hb <;> rcases h_col c (by simp) with hc | hc
  · exact hS_indep a ha b hb ⟨h_ord.2.ne, hab⟩
  · exact hS_indep a ha b hb ⟨h_ord.2.ne, hab⟩
  · exact hS_indep c hc a ha ⟨h_ord.1.ne.symm, hca⟩
  · exact hS_indep b hb c hc ⟨h_ord.1.ne, hbc⟩
  · exact hNS_indep a ha b hb ⟨h_ord.2.ne, hab⟩
  · exact hNS_indep c hc a ha ⟨h_ord.1.ne.symm, hca⟩
  · exact hNS_indep b hb c hc ⟨h_ord.1.ne, hbc⟩
  · exact hNS_indep a ha b hb ⟨h_ord.2.ne, hab⟩

let m := (n + 1).sqrt
  have hm : 10 ≤ m := Nat.le_sqrt.mpr (by linarith)
  let k := m - 1
  have hk : 9 ≤ k := Nat.le_pred_of_lt (by linarith)
  let t₁ := 2 * k ^ 2 - 4 * k
  let t₂ := 2 * k ^ 2 + 1
  let t₃ := 2 * k ^ 2 + 4 * k
  have h_low : n ≤ t₁ := by
    have : (k + 2) ^ 2 ≤ t₁ := by dsimp [t₁]; nlinarith
    have : n < (k + 2) ^ 2 := by
      rw [← Nat.sqrt_lt, Nat.add_comm]; apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.sqrt_le_add n)
      simp [m, k]; linarith
    linarith
  have h_high : t₃ ≤ 2 * n := by
    dsimp [t₃]; rw [two_mul]
    apply Nat.add_le_add <;>
    { have : (k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ n + 1 := Nat.sqrt_le_add n; nlinarith }
  have h_ord : t₁ < t₂ ∧ t₂ < t₃ := by
    dsimp [t₁, t₂, t₃]; constructor <;>
    { apply Nat.sub_lt_left_of_lt_add; nlinarith; linarith }
  have mem : ∀ t, t ∈ [t₁, t₂, t₃] → t ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    intro t ht; simp at ht; rw [Finset.mem_Icc]
    rcases ht with rfl | rfl | rfl
    · exact ⟨h_low, by trans t₃; trans t₂; linarith; linarith; exact h_high⟩
    · exact ⟨by trans t₁; exact h_low; linarith, by trans t₃; linarith; exact h_high⟩
    · exact ⟨by trans t₁; exact h_low; trans t₂; linarith; linarith, h_high⟩
  have sq12 : IsSquare (t₁ + t₂) := by
    use 2 * k - 1; dsimp [t₁, t₂]
    zify [show 4 * k ≤ 2 * k ^ 2 by nlinarith]; ring
  have sq13 : IsSquare (t₁ + t₃) := by
    use 2 * k; dsimp [t₁, t₃]
    zify [show 4 * k ≤ 2 * k ^ 2 by nlinarith]; ring
  have sq23 : IsSquare (t₂ + t₃) := by use 2 * k + 1; dsimp [t₂, t₃]; ring
  by_contra h; push_neg at h
  rcases h with ⟨hS_no, hSc_no⟩
  by_cases h1 : t₁ ∈ S
  · have h2 : t₂ ∉ S := fun h2 => hS_no t₁ h1 t₂ h2 h_ord.1.ne sq12
    have h3 : t₃ ∉ S := fun h3 => hS_no t₁ h1 t₃ h3 (by linarith) sq13
    exact hSc_no t₂ (by simp [mem t₂ (by simp), h2]) t₃ (by simp [mem t₃ (by simp), h3]) h_ord.2.ne sq23
  · have h1c : t₁ ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by simp [mem t₁ (by simp), h1]
    have h2 : t₂ ∈ S := by
      by_contra h2; exact hSc_no t₁ h1c t₂ (by simp [mem t₂ (by simp), h2]) h_ord.1.ne sq12
    have h3 : t₃ ∈ S := by
      by_contra h3; exact hSc_no t₁ h1c t₃ (by simp [mem t₃ (by simp), h3]) (by linarith) sq13
    exact hS_no t₂ h2 t₃ h3 h_ord.2.ne sq23

let m := (3 * n).sqrt
  let k := if m % 2 = 0 then m else m + 1
  have hk : Even k := by dsimp [k]; split_ifs <;> simp [Nat.even_iff, Nat.not_even_iff] at * <;> assumption
  let b := k ^ 2 / 2 - 2 * k
  let a := k ^ 2 / 2 + 1
  let c := k ^ 2 / 2 + 2 * k
  have h_bound : n ≤ b ∧ c ≤ 2 * n := by
    by_cases h : n < 120
    · have : n ∈ Finset.Ico 100 120 := by rw [Finset.mem_Ico]; exact ⟨hn, h⟩
      fin_cases n <;> { dsimp [a, b, c, k, m]; decide }
    · have : 120 ≤ n := not_lt.1 h
      have : m ^ 2 ≤ 3 * n := Nat.sqrt_le _
      have : 3 * n < (m + 1) ^ 2 := Nat.lt_succ_sqrt _
      have : k ≤ m + 1 := by dsimp [k]; split_ifs <;> simp_arith
      have : m ≤ k := by dsimp [k]; split_ifs <;> simp_arith
      have eq1 : 2 * b = k^2 - 4*k := by
        dsimp [b]; rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.div_two_mul_two_of_even (Nat.even_pow.2 ⟨hk, by norm_num⟩)]
      have eq2 : 2 * c = k^2 + 4*k := by
        dsimp [c]; rw [Nat.mul_add, Nat.div_two_mul_two_of_even (Nat.even_pow.2 ⟨hk, by norm_num⟩)]
      zify at *
      constructor <;> nlinarith
  have h_sq : IsSquare (a + b) ∧ IsSquare (b + c) ∧ IsSquare (c + a) := by
    have h1 : a + b = (k - 1) ^ 2 := by

    have h2 : b + c = k ^ 2 := by
      dsimp [b, c]; zify; ring_nf; rw [Nat.div_two_mul_two_of_even (Nat.even_pow.2 ⟨hk, by norm_num⟩)]; ring
    have h3 : c + a = (k + 1) ^ 2 := by
      dsimp [c, a]; zify; ring_nf; rw [Nat.div_two_mul_two_of_even (Nat.even_pow.2 ⟨hk, by norm_num⟩)]; ring
    exact ⟨⟨k - 1, h1.symm⟩, ⟨k, h2.symm⟩, ⟨k + 1, h3.symm⟩⟩
  have h_diff : a ≠ b ∧ b ≠ c ∧ a ≠ c := by
    dsimp [a, b, c]; zify; constructor <;> try constructor <;> linarith [Nat.sqrt_le (3 * n)]
  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have ha : a ∈ S ∨ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by
    if ha : a ∈ S then left; exact ha else right; exact Finset.mem_sdiff.2 ⟨by simp [h_bound.1, le_trans h_bound.2 (by linarith)], ha⟩
  have hb : b ∈ S ∨ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by
    if hb : b ∈ S then left; exact hb else right; exact Finset.mem_sdiff.2 ⟨by simp [h_bound.1, le_trans h_bound.2 (by linarith)], hb⟩
  have hc : c ∈ S ∨ c ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by
    if hc : c ∈ S then left; exact hc else right; exact Finset.mem_sdiff.2 ⟨by simp [h_bound.1, h_bound.2], hc⟩
  rcases ha with ha | ha <;> rcases hb with hb | hb <;> rcases hc with hc | hc
  · exact h.1 a ha b hb h_diff.1 h_sq.1
  · exact h.1 b hb c hc h_diff.2.1 h_sq.2.1
  · exact h.1 a ha c hc h_diff.2.2 h_sq.2.2
  · exact h.2 a ha b hb h_diff.1 h_sq.1
  · exact h.2 b hb c hc h_diff.2.1 h_sq.2.1
  · exact h.2 a ha c hc h_diff.2.2 h_sq.2.2
  · exact h.2 a ha b hb h_diff.1 h_sq.1
  · exact h.2 a ha b hb h_diff.1 h_sq.1

let k := (n + 1).sqrt - 1
  have hk : 9 ≤ k := by
    have : 100 ≤ n + 1 := by linarith
    rw [le_tsub_iff_right, ← Nat.sqrt_le_iff] <;> norm_num
    exact le_trans (by norm_num) this
  let x := 2 * k ^ 2 - 4 * k
  let y := 2 * k ^ 2 + 4 * k
  let z := 2 * k ^ 2 + 1
  have h4k : 4 * k ≤ 2 * k ^ 2 := by
    rw [mul_assoc, mul_comm 4, ← mul_assoc]
    exact Nat.mul_le_mul_right k (by linarith)
  have h_xyz : x < z ∧ z < y := by
    constructor <;> dsimp [x, y, z] <;> apply Nat.sub_lt_left_of_lt_add h4k <;> linarith
  have h_range : {x, y, z} ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    simp only [Finset.subset_iff, Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton, forall_eq_or_imp]
    have h_n_le_x : n ≤ x := by
      have : n + 1 < (k + 2) ^ 2 := Nat.lt_succ_sqrt (n + 1)
      have : (k + 2) ^ 2 ≤ 2 * k ^ 2 - 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith
      linarith
    have h_y_le_2n : y ≤ 2 * n := by
      have : (k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ n + 1 := Nat.sqrt_le (n + 1)
      nlinarith
    refine ⟨⟨h_n_le_x, le_trans (le_of_lt h_xyz.2) h_y_le_2n⟩,
            ⟨le_trans h_n_le_x (le_trans (le_of_lt h_xyz.1) (le_of_lt h_xyz.2)), h_y_le_2n⟩,
            ⟨le_trans h_n_le_x (le_of_lt h_xyz.1), le_trans (le_of_lt h_xyz.2) h_y_le_2n⟩⟩
  have h_sq : IsSquare (x + y) ∧ IsSquare (y + z) ∧ IsSquare (z + x) := by
    refine ⟨⟨2 * k, by dsimp [x, y]; rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel h4k]; ring⟩,
            ⟨2 * k + 1, by dsimp [y, z]; ring⟩,
            ⟨2 * k - 1, by dsimp [z, x]; rw [add_comm, Nat.add_sub_of_le h4k];
                           have : 4 * k ≤ 4 * k^2 + 1 := by nlinarith;
                           rw [tsub_eq_iff_eq_add_of_le this]; ring⟩⟩
  let T : Finset ℕ := {x, y, z}
  have hT : T.card = 3 := by
    simp [T]; repeat (constructor <;> try apply ne_of_lt); exact h_xyz.1; exact lt_trans h_xyz.1 h_xyz.2; exact h_xyz.2
  have h_part : (T ∩ S).card + (T \ S).card = 3 := by rw [← Finset.card_union_of_disjoint disjoint_sdiff_inter, Finset.inter_union_sdiff_of_subset (by simp), hT]
  by_cases h : 2 ≤ (T ∩ S).card
  · left; rcases Finset.exists_ne_of_one_lt_card h with ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab⟩
    simp only [Finset.mem_inter] at ha hb
    refine ⟨a, ha.2, b, hb.2, hab, ?_⟩
    rcases ha.1 with rfl | rfl | rfl <;> rcases hb.1 with rfl | rfl | rfl <;> try (exact (hab rfl).elim)
    all_goals (first | exact h_sq.1 | exact h_sq.2.1 | exact h_sq.2.2 | rw [add_comm]; first | exact h_sq.1 | exact h_sq.2.1 | exact h_sq.2.2)
  · right; have : 2 ≤ (T \ S).card := by linarith
    rcases Finset.exists_ne_of_one_lt_card this with ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab⟩
    simp only [Finset.mem_sdiff] at ha hb
    refine ⟨a, ⟨h_range ha.1, ha.2⟩, b, ⟨h_range hb.1, hb.2⟩, hab, ?_⟩
    rcases ha.1 with rfl | rfl | rfl <;> rcases hb.1 with rfl | rfl | rfl <;> try (exact (hab rfl).elim)
    all_goals (first | exact h_sq.1 | exact h_sq.2.1 | exact h_sq.2.2 | rw [add_comm]; first | exact h_sq.1 | exact h_sq.2.1 | exact h_sq.2.2)

let s := (2 * n + 4).sqrt
  let k := if s % 2 = 1 then s + 2 else s + 3
  let x := (k ^ 2 - 2 * k - 3) / 2
  let y := (k ^ 2 + 2 * k + 3) / 2
  let z := (k ^ 2 + 6 * k + 5) / 2
  have hk_odd : k % 2 = 1 := by
    dsimp [k]; split_ifs <;> simp_all
    · omega
    · rw [Nat.add_mod]; simp [Nat.add_mod, *]; rfl
  have h_div : 2 ∣ (k ^ 2 - 2 * k - 3) ∧ 2 ∣ (k ^ 2 + 2 * k + 3) ∧ 2 ∣ (k ^ 2 + 6 * k + 5) := by
    have : k ^ 2 % 2 = 1 := by rw [Nat.sq_odd_iff]; exact hk_odd
    constructor <;> constructor <;> omega
  have h_sq : IsSquare (x + y) ∧ IsSquare (y + z) ∧ IsSquare (z + x) := by
    refine ⟨⟨k, ?_⟩, ⟨k + 2, ?_⟩, ⟨k + 1, ?_⟩⟩
    all_goals
      apply Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_right (b := 2) (by decide)
      rw [Nat.mul_add, Nat.div_mul_cancel h_div.1, Nat.div_mul_cancel h_div.2.1, Nat.div_mul_cancel h_div.2.2]
      ring
  have h_bound : n ≤ x ∧ z ≤ 2 * n := by
    have hs1 : s ^ 2 ≤ 2 * n + 4 := Nat.sqrt_le' _
    have hs2 : 2 * n + 4 < (s + 1) ^ 2 := Nat.lt_succ_sqrt' _
    have : 14 ≤ s := Nat.le_sqrt.mpr (by linarith)
    have : k ≤ s + 3 := by dsimp [k]; split_ifs <;> linarith
    have : s + 2 ≤ k := by dsimp [k]; split_ifs <;> linarith
    constructor
    · rw [le_div_iff_mul_le (by decide)]; nlinarith
    · rw [div_le_iff_le_mul (by decide)]; nlinarith
  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  let V := {x, y, z}
  have hV : V ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    intro v hv; rw [Finset.mem_Icc]
    simp at hv; rcases hv with rfl | rfl | rfl
    · exact ⟨h_bound.1, le_trans (by omega) h_bound.2⟩
    · exact ⟨le_trans h_bound.1 (by omega), le_trans (by omega) h_bound.2⟩
    · exact ⟨le_trans h_bound.1 (by omega), h_bound.2⟩
  have ne : x ≠ y ∧ y ≠ z ∧ z ≠ x := by
    have : 14 ≤ k := by
      have : 14 ≤ s := Nat.le_sqrt.mpr (by linarith)
      dsimp [k]; split_ifs <;> linarith
    omega

  obtain ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩ := h_cases x (by simp), h_cases y (by simp), h_cases z (by simp)
  all_goals
    try { exact h.1 x (by assumption) y (by assumption) ⟨ne.1, h_sq.1⟩ }
    try { exact h.2 x (by assumption) y (by assumption) ⟨ne.1, h_sq.1⟩ }
    try { exact h.1 y (by assumption) z (by assumption) ⟨ne.2.1, h_sq.2.1⟩ }
    try { exact h.2 y (by assumption) z (by assumption) ⟨ne.2.1, h_sq.2.1⟩ }
    try { exact h.1 z (by assumption) x (by assumption) ⟨ne.2.2.symm, h_sq.2.2⟩ }
    try { exact h.2 z (by assumption) x (by assumption) ⟨ne.2.2.symm, h_sq.2.2⟩ }

let m := Nat.sqrt (2 * n + 4)
  have hm : 14 ≤ m := Nat.le_sqrt_of_le_sq (le_trans (by norm_num) (Nat.add_le_add_right (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 hn) 4))
  let k := m + 3 - m % 2
  have hk_odd : k % 2 = 1 := by
    dsimp [k]
    rcases Nat.mod_two_eq_zero_or_one m with h | h <;> rw [h] <;> rfl
  have hk_ge : m + 2 ≤ k := by
    dsimp [k]
    rcases Nat.mod_two_eq_zero_or_one m with h | h <;> rw [h] <;> norm_num
  
  let j := k / 2
  have hj : k = 2 * j + 1 := by rw [Nat.mul_comm, ← Nat.div_add_mod k 2, hk_odd]
  
  let a := 2 * j^2 - 2
  let b := 2 * j^2 + 8 * j + 6
  let c := 2 * j^2 + 4 * j + 3

  have h_distinct : a ≠ b ∧ b ≠ c ∧ c ≠ a := by
    have : 14 ≤ k := le_trans (le_trans hm (le_add_right m 2)) hk_ge
    have : 7 ≤ j := by rw [hj] at this; linarith
    constructor <;> try constructor <;> dsimp [a, b, c] <;> nlinarith

  have h_range : {a, b, c} ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    intro x hx
    simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl
    · constructor
      · have : (m + 1)^2 ≤ (2 * j)^2 := by
          gcongr
          rw [hj] at hk_ge
          linarith
        have : 2 * n + 4 < (m + 1)^2 := Nat.lt_succ_sqrt _
        have : 2 * n + 4 < 4 * j^2 := lt_of_lt_of_le this (by rw [Nat.pow_two (2*j)]; ring_nf; exact this_1)
        have : n + 2 ≤ 2 * j^2 := by linarith
        dsimp [a]; linarith
      · apply le_trans _ (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left n (by norm_num))
        dsimp [a, b]; linarith
    · constructor
      · apply le_trans _ (le_of_lt (Nat.lt_succ_sqrt (2*n+4))); dsimp [b]; linarith
      · have : k^2 + 6 * k + 5 ≤ 4 * n := by
          have h_bound : m^2 + 12 * m + 32 ≤ 4 * n := by
            by_cases h15 : 15 ≤ m
            · have : m^2 - 12 * m - 40 ≥ 0 := by
                 have : m * (m - 12) ≥ 15 * 3 := by gcongr; exact le_trans (by norm_num) h15; exact Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (by norm_num) h15
                 linarith
              have : 2 * (m^2 - 4) - (m^2 + 12 * m + 32) ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have : m^2 - 4 ≤ 2 * n := Nat.le_of_add_le_add_right (Nat.sqrt_le_add (2*n+4))
              linarith
            · have : m = 14 := by linarith
              rw [this]; norm_num; linarith
          have : k^2 + 6 * k + 5 ≤ (m + 3)^2 + 6 * (m + 3) + 5 := by gcongr; apply Nat.sub_le
          have : (m + 3)^2 + 6 * (m + 3) + 5 = m^2 + 12 * m + 32 := by ring
          rw [this] at this_1
          rw [hj]; ring_nf at this_1 ⊢
          linarith
        dsimp [b]; rw [hj] at this; ring_nf at this ⊢; linarith
    · constructor
      · dsimp [a, c]; linarith
      · dsimp [b, c]; linarith

  have h_sq : IsSquare (a + b) ∧ IsSquare (b + c) ∧ IsSquare (c + a) := by
    dsimp [a, b, c]
    constructor; use 2 * j + 2; ring
    constructor; use 2 * j + 3; ring
    use 2 * j + 1; ring

  rcases h_distinct with ⟨hab, hbc, hca⟩
  rcases h_sq with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  have ha_mem : a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := h_range (by simp)
  have hb_mem : b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := h_range (by simp)
  have hc_mem : c ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := h_range (by simp)

  by_cases h : {a, b, c} ⊆ S
  · left
    use a; constructor; exact h (by simp); use b; constructor; exact h (by simp); exact ⟨hab, ha⟩
  · right
    rw [Finset.subset_iff] at h; push_neg at h
    rcases h with ⟨x, hx, hxS⟩
    simp at hx
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl
    · by_cases hbS : b ∈ S
      · by_cases hcS : c ∈ S
        · use b; constructor; simp [hb_mem, hbS]; use c; constructor; simp [hc_mem, hcS]; exact ⟨hbc, hb⟩
        · use a; constructor; simp [ha_mem, hxS]; use c; constructor; simp [hc_mem, hcS]; exact ⟨hca.symm, (add_comm c a) ▸ hc⟩
      · use a; constructor; simp [ha_mem, hxS]; use b; constructor; simp [hb_mem, hbS]; exact ⟨hab, ha⟩
    · by_cases haS : a ∈ S
      · by_cases hcS : c ∈ S
        · use a; constructor; simp [ha_mem, haS]; use c; constructor; simp [hc_mem, hcS]; exact ⟨hca.symm, (add_comm c a) ▸ hc⟩
        · use b; constructor; simp [hb_mem, hxS]; use c; constructor; simp [hc_mem, hcS]; exact ⟨hbc, hb⟩
      · use b; constructor; simp [hb_mem, hxS]; use a; constructor; simp [ha_mem, haS]; exact ⟨hab.symm, (add_comm a b) ▸ ha⟩
    · by_cases haS : a ∈ S
      · by_cases hbS : b ∈ S
        · use a; constructor; simp [ha_mem, haS]; use b; constructor; simp [hb_mem, hbS]; exact ⟨hab, ha⟩
        · use c; constructor; simp [hc_mem, hxS]; use b; constructor; simp [hb_mem, hbS]; exact ⟨hbc.symm, (add_comm b c) ▸ hb⟩
      · use c; constructor; simp [hc_mem, hxS]; use a; constructor; simp [ha_mem, haS]; exact ⟨hca, hc⟩

-- We prove that the graph of compatible pairs contains a triangle (a, b, c).
  -- This implies the graph is not bipartite, so any partition S ∪ S^c has an edge within one part.
  have triangle_lemma : ∀ (a b c : ℕ),
      a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) → b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) → c ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) →
      a ≠ b → b ≠ c → c ≠ a →
      IsSquare (a + b) → IsSquare (b + c) → IsSquare (c + a) →
      (∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) ∨
      (∃ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, ∃ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S,
        a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) := by
    intro a b c ha hb hc hab hbc hca hab_sq hbc_sq hca_sq
    by_contra! h
    have haS : a ∈ S ∨ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by simp [ha]
    have hbS : b ∈ S ∨ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by simp [hb]
    have hcS : c ∈ S ∨ c ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by simp [hc]
    cases haS with
    | inl ha_in => cases hbS with
      | inl hb_in => exact h.1 a ha_in b hb_in hab hab_sq
      | inr hb_out => cases hcS with
        | inl hc_in => exact h.1 a ha_in c hc_in hca.symm (by rwa [add_comm])
        | inr hc_out => exact h.2 b hb_out c hc_out hbc hbc_sq
    | inr ha_out => cases hbS with
      | inl hb_in => cases hcS with
        | inl hc_in => exact h.1 b hb_in c hc_in hbc hbc_sq
        | inr hc_out => exact h.2 a ha_out c hc_out hca.symm (by rwa [add_comm])
      | inr hb_out => exact h.2 a ha_out b hb_out hab hab_sq

  -- We construct a triangle using the parameter k.
  -- Vertices: 2k^2-2, 2k^2+4k+3, 2k^2+8k+6.
  -- Valid for n in [k^2+4k+3, 2k^2-2].
  -- The union of these intervals for k ≥ 8 covers [99, ∞).
  have exists_k : ∃ k ≥ 8, k^2 + 4 * k + 3 ≤ n ∧ n ≤ 2 * k^2 - 2 := by
    let P := fun k => n ≤ 2 * k^2 - 2
    have hP : ∃ k, P k := by
      use n; simp [P]
      calc n ≤ 2 * n - 2 := by omega
           _ ≤ 2 * n^2 - 2 := Nat.sub_le_sub_right (by gcongr; apply Nat.le_mul_self) _
    let k := Nat.find hP
    have hk_prop : n ≤ 2 * k^2 - 2 := Nat.find_spec hP
    have k_ge_8 : k ≥ 8 := by
      by_contra! h_lt
      have : 2 * k^2 - 2 < 100 := by
        calc 2 * k^2 - 2 < 2 * 8^2 - 2 := Nat.sub_lt_sub_right (by norm_num) (by gcongr)
             _ = 126 := by norm_num
      omega
    use k; refine ⟨k_ge_8, ?_, hk_prop⟩
    by_cases hk8 : k = 8
    · rw [hk8]; norm_num; linarith
    · have : k > 8 := by omega
      have not_prop := Nat.find_min hP (Nat.pred_lt (by omega))
      simp [P] at not_prop
      have overlap : k^2 + 4 * k + 3 ≤ 2 * (k - 1)^2 - 2 + 1 := by
        have : k ≥ 9 := by omega
        nlinarith
      omega

  obtain ⟨k, _, hn_min, hn_max⟩ := exists_k
  let a := 2 * k^2 - 2
  let b := 2 * k^2 + 4 * k + 3
  let c := 2 * k^2 + 8 * k + 6
  have ha : a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]; constructor <;> nlinarith
  have hb : b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]; constructor <;> nlinarith
  have hc : c ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]; constructor <;> nlinarith
  
  have h_sq1 : IsSquare (a + b) := by use 2 * k + 1; ring
  have h_sq2 : IsSquare (b + c) := by use 2 * k + 3; ring
  have h_sq3 : IsSquare (c + a) := by use 2 * k + 2; ring
  
  exact triangle_lemma a b c ha hb hc (by nlinarith) (by nlinarith) (by nlinarith) h_sq1 h_sq2 h_sq3

let m := (4 * n).sqrt
  let k := m - 3 - m % 2
  let a := (k ^ 2 + 2 * k + 3) / 2
  let b := (k ^ 2 - 2 * k - 3) / 2
  let c := (k ^ 2 + 6 * k + 5) / 2
  have hm : 20 ≤ m := Nat.le_sqrt.mpr (by linarith)
  have hk : 17 ≤ k ∧ k % 2 = 1 := by
    rcases Nat.mod_two_eq_zero_or_one m with h | h <;> rw [h] <;> dsimp [k]
    · constructor <;> linarith
    · constructor <;> norm_num; linarith
  have h_int : 2 * a = k^2 + 2*k + 3 ∧ 2 * b = k^2 - 2*k - 3 ∧ 2 * c = k^2 + 6*k + 5 := by
    have h_even : ∀ x, x % 2 = 1 → (x + 3) % 2 = 0 := by intros; omega
    have h_sub : 2 * k + 3 ≤ k ^ 2 := by have := hk.1; nlinarith
    repeat' constructor
    all_goals apply Nat.two_mul_div_two_of_even; rw [Nat.even_iff]
    · rw [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_rem, Nat.mul_rem, hk.2]; rfl
    · rw [Nat.sub_rem (by linarith) h_sub, Nat.sub_rem (by linarith) (by linarith)]; simp [hk.2]; linarith
    · rw [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_rem, Nat.mul_rem, hk.2]; rfl
  have h_bound_c : c ≤ 2 * n := by
    apply Nat.le_of_mul_le_mul_left (a := 2) (by norm_num)
    rw [h_int.2.2]
    trans m^2 - 4
    · have : k ≤ m - 3 := by rcases Nat.mod_two_eq_zero_or_one m with h | h <;> rw [h] <;> dsimp [k] <;> linarith
      nlinarith
    · trans 4 * n
      · exact Nat.sqrt_le (4 * n)
      · linarith
  have h_bound_b : n ≤ b := by
    apply Nat.le_of_mul_le_mul_left (a := 2) (by norm_num)
    rw [h_int.2.1]
    have : k ≥ m - 4 := by rcases Nat.mod_two_eq_zero_or_one m with h | h <;> rw [h] <;> dsimp [k] <;> linarith
    have h_mono : (m - 4)^2 - 2 * (m - 4) - 3 ≤ k^2 - 2*k - 3 := by
      have : 17 ≤ m - 4 := by linarith
      nlinarith
    trans (m-4)^2 - 2*(m-4) - 3; exact h_mono
    trans m^2 - 10*m + 21
    · have : m ≥ 4 := by linarith
      nlinarith -- Ring expansion
    · have h_sq : 4 * n < (m + 1)^2 := Nat.lt_succ_sqrt (4 * n)
      have : 2 * (2 * n) < 2 * ((m+1)^2 / 2 + 1) := by linarith
      apply le_trans (b := (m+1)^2 - 1)
      · linarith
      · have : (m + 1)^2 ≤ 2 * (m^2 - 10 * m + 21) := by
           have : m^2 - 22 * m + 41 ≥ 0 := by
             have : m^2 - 22*m + 41 = (m-11)^2 - 80 := by have : m ≥ 11 := by linarith; ring_nf; rfl
             rw [this]; nlinarith
           nlinarith
        linarith
  have h_abc : b < a ∧ a < c := by
    constructor <;> apply Nat.lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left (a := 2) (by norm_num) <;>
      simp [h_int] <;> (have := hk.1; nlinarith)
  have h_sq : IsSquare (a + b) ∧ IsSquare (b + c) ∧ IsSquare (c + a) := by
    refine ⟨⟨k, ?_⟩, ⟨k+1, ?_⟩, ⟨k+2, ?_⟩⟩ <;> apply Nat.mul_left_cancel (n:=2) (by norm_num) <;>
      rw [Nat.mul_add, h_int.1, h_int.2.1, h_int.2.2] <;> ring
  let T := Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S
  have mem_all : ∀ x ∈ ({a, b, c} : Finset ℕ), x ∈ S ∨ x ∈ T := by
    intro x hx; simp at hx
    have : x ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
      rw [Finset.mem_Icc]; rcases hx with rfl|rfl|rfl <;> constructor <;> linarith
    if h : x ∈ S then left; exact h else right; exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨this, h⟩
  by_contra! h
  rcases mem_all a (by simp) with ha | ha <;> rcases mem_all b (by simp) with hb | hb <;> rcases mem_all c (by simp) with hc | hc
  · exact h a ha b hb (ne_of_gt h_abc.1) h_sq.1
  · exact h a ha b hb (ne_of_gt h_abc.1) h_sq.1
  · exact h a ha c hc (ne_of_lt (trans h_abc.1 h_abc.2)) h_sq.2.2
  · exact h.2 b hb c hc (ne_of_lt h_abc.2) h_sq.2.1
  · exact h.2 a ha b hb (ne_of_gt h_abc.1) h_sq.1
  · exact h.2 a ha c hc (ne_of_lt (trans h_abc.1 h_abc.2)) h_sq.2.2
  · exact h.2 b hb c hc (ne_of_lt h_abc.2) h_sq.2.1
  · exact h.2 a ha b hb (ne_of_gt h_abc.1) h_sq.1

let s := (2 * n).sqrt
  have hs : 14 ≤ s := Nat.le_sqrt.mpr (by linarith)
  let k := if s % 2 = 0 then s + 3 else if (s + 1)^2 < 2 * n + 4 then s + 4 else s + 2
  have hk_odd : k % 2 = 1 := by
    if h : s % 2 = 0 then simp [k, h]; omega
    else simp [k, h]; split_ifs <;> omega
  have hk_bounds : 2 * n ≤ (k - 1)^2 - 4 ∧ (k + 3)^2 ≤ 4 * n + 4 := by
    have h1 : s^2 ≤ 2 * n := Nat.sqrt_le_self (2 * n)
    split_ifs at k with h_even h_cond
    · constructor
      · calc 2 * n ≤ (s + 1)^2 - 1 := by nlinarith [h1]
             _ ≤ (s + 2)^2 - 4 := by nlinarith [hs]
             _ = (k - 1)^2 - 4 := by simp [k, h_even]
      · have : 12 * s + 32 ≤ 2 * n := by
          by_cases h15 : 15 ≤ s
          · calc 12 * s + 32 ≤ s^2 := by nlinarith [h15]
                 _ ≤ 2 * n := h1
          · have : s = 14 := by linarith [hs, h15]
            rw [this]; linarith
        calc (k + 3)^2 = s^2 + 12 * s + 36 := by simp [k, h_even]; ring
             _ ≤ 2 * n + 12 * s + 36 := by linarith
             _ ≤ 4 * n + 4 := by linarith
    · constructor
      · nlinarith
      · have : (s + 7)^2 ≤ 2 * s^2 + 4 * s - 2 := by nlinarith [hs]
        have : 2 * s^2 + 4 * s - 2 ≤ 4 * n + 4 := by
           have : (s+1)^2 - 4 < 2 * n := by nlinarith [h_cond]
           nlinarith
        linarith
    · constructor
      · nlinarith
      · have : (s + 5)^2 ≤ 2 * s^2 + 4 := by nlinarith [hs]
        linarith [h1]

  let a := ((k - 1)^2 - 4) / 2
  let b := ((k + 1)^2 + 2) / 2
  let c := ((k + 3)^2 - 4) / 2

  have ha : 2 * a = (k - 1)^2 - 4 := Nat.div_two_mul_two_of_even (by omega)
  have hb : 2 * b = (k + 1)^2 + 2 := Nat.div_two_mul_two_of_even (by omega)
  have hc : 2 * c = (k + 3)^2 - 4 := Nat.div_two_mul_two_of_even (by omega)

  have hn_a : n ≤ a := by linarith [hk_bounds.1, ha]
  have hc_2n : c ≤ 2 * n := by linarith [hk_bounds.2, hc]
  have hab : a < b := by linarith [ha, hb, hs]
  have hbc : b < c := by linarith [hb, hc, hs]

  have h_ab : IsSquare (a + b) := ⟨k, by linarith [ha, hb]⟩
  have h_bc : IsSquare (b + c) := ⟨k + 2, by linarith [hb, hc]⟩
  have h_ca : IsSquare (c + a) := ⟨k + 1, by linarith [hc, ha]⟩

  have mem : ∀ x ∈ ({a, b, c} : Finset ℕ), x ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := fun x hx ↦ by
    fin_cases hx <;> rw [Finset.mem_Icc] <;> constructor <;> linarith

  if h : a ∈ S ∧ b ∈ S then left; use a, h.1, b, h.2, ne_of_lt hab, h_ab
  else if h : b ∈ S ∧ c ∈ S then left; use b, h.1, c, h.2, ne_of_lt hbc, h_bc
  else if h : a ∈ S ∧ c ∈ S then left; use a, h.1, c, h.2, ne_of_lt (hab.trans hbc), by rwa [add_comm] at h_ca
  else
    right
    have : a ∉ S ∧ b ∉ S ∨ b ∉ S ∧ c ∉ S ∨ a ∉ S ∧ c ∉ S := by tauto
    rcases this with ⟨ha', hb'⟩ | ⟨hb', hc'⟩ | ⟨ha', hc'⟩
    · use a, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨mem a (by simp), ha'⟩), b, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨mem b (by simp), hb'⟩), ne_of_lt hab, h_ab
    · use b, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨mem b (by simp), hb'⟩), c, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨mem c (by simp), hc'⟩), ne_of_lt hbc, h_bc
    · use a, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨mem a (by simp), ha'⟩), c, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨mem c (by simp), hc'⟩), ne_of_lt (hab.trans hbc), by rwa [add_comm] at h_ca

let k := (n + 1).sqrt - 1
  have hk : 9 ≤ k := by
    rw [Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le]
    · rewrite [Nat.le_sqrt]; linarith
    · exact le_trans (by norm_num) (Nat.sqrt_le_sqrt (Nat.add_le_add_right hn 1))
  let a := 2 * k * (k - 2)
  let b := 2 * k ^ 2 + 1
  let c := 2 * k * (k + 2)
  have ha : n ≤ a := by
    have : (n + 1).sqrt < k + 2 := by rw [Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le]; exact le_tsub_add
    have := Nat.pow_lt_pow_left this 2
    dsimp [a]; zify at *; nlinarith
  have hc : c ≤ 2 * n := by
    have : k + 1 ≤ (n + 1).sqrt := Nat.le_add_of_sub_le (le_refl _)
    have := Nat.pow_le_pow_left_of_le this 2
    dsimp [c]; zify at *; nlinarith
  have h_distinct : a < b ∧ b < c := by dsimp [a, b, c]; zify; constructor <;> nlinarith
  have h_mem : {a, b, c} ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    simp [Finset.subset_iff, ha, hc, h_distinct.1.le, h_distinct.2.le, le_trans ha (le_of_lt h_distinct.1), le_trans (le_of_lt h_distinct.2) hc]
  let T : Finset ℕ := {a, b, c}
  have h_sq : ∀ x ∈ T, ∀ y ∈ T, x < y → IsSquare (x + y) := by
    intro x hx y hy hxy
    simp only [T, Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx hy
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl <;> rcases hy with rfl | rfl | rfl
    any_goals (exfalso; linarith)
    all_goals
      dsimp [a, b, c]; rw [IsSquare]; zify;
      try { use 2 * k - 1; ring }
      try { use 2 * k; ring }
      try { use 2 * k + 1; ring }
  classical
  by_cases h : ∃ u ∈ T ∩ S, ∃ v ∈ T ∩ S, u ≠ v
  · left; rcases h with ⟨u, hu, v, hv, huv⟩
    have : u < v ∨ v < u := ne_iff_lt_or_gt.mp huv
    rcases this with hlt | hlt
    · exact ⟨u, (Finset.mem_inter.mp hu).2, v, (Finset.mem_inter.mp hv).2, huv, h_sq u (Finset.mem_inter.mp hu).1 v (Finset.mem_inter.mp hv).1 hlt⟩
    · exact ⟨v, (Finset.mem_inter.mp hv).2, u, (Finset.mem_inter.mp hu).2, huv.symm, h_sq v (Finset.mem_inter.mp hv).1 u (Finset.mem_inter.mp hu).1 hlt⟩
  · right
    push_neg at h
    have : (T \ S).card ≥ 2 := by
      have : (T ∩ S).card ≤ 1 := Finset.card_le_one.mpr (fun u hu v hv => not_not.mp (h u hu v hv))
      have : T.card = 3 := by
        simp [T, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem, Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton]
        push_neg; constructor <;> constructor <;> linarith [h_distinct.1, h_distinct.2]
      rw [Finset.card_sdiff (Finset.inter_subset_left _ _)]; omega
    rcases Finset.one_lt_card_iff.mp this with ⟨u, hu, v, hv, huv⟩
    have : u < v ∨ v < u := ne_iff_lt_or_gt.mp huv
    rcases this with hlt | hlt
    · exact ⟨u, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hu).imp (fun h => h_mem h) id, v, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hv).imp (fun h => h_mem h) id, huv, h_sq u (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hu).1 v (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hv).1 hlt⟩
    · exact ⟨v, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hv).imp (fun h => h_mem h) id, u, (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hu).imp (fun h => h_mem h) id, huv.symm, h_sq v (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hv).1 u (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hu).1 hlt⟩

let m := (n + 1).sqrt
  let k := m - 1
  have hm : m = k + 1 := by
    have h : 10 ≤ (n + 1).sqrt := Nat.le_sqrt.mpr (by linarith)
    simp [k, m] at *
    exact (Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add h).mp rfl
  have hk : 9 ≤ k := by rw [hm] at *; have := Nat.le_sqrt.mpr (by linarith : 100+1 ≤ n+1); linarith
  
  let a := 2 * k ^ 2 + 1
  let b := 2 * k ^ 2 - 4 * k
  let c := 2 * k ^ 2 + 4 * k

  have h_distinct : a ≠ b ∧ b ≠ c ∧ a ≠ c := by
    dsimp [a, b, c]; zify [hk]; constructor <;> try constructor <;> linarith

  have h_range : {a, b, c} ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    intro x hx
    simp at hx
    have h1 := Nat.sqrt_le_self (n + 1)
    have h2 := Nat.lt_succ_sqrt (n + 1)
    rw [hm] at h1 h2
    have hb : n ≤ b := by dsimp [b]; zify at h2 ⊢; nlinarith
    have hc : c ≤ 2 * n := by dsimp [c]; zify at h1 ⊢; nlinarith
    have ha : n ≤ a ∧ a ≤ 2 * n := by dsimp [a, b, c] at *; zify at *; constructor <;> nlinarith
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl <;> rw [Finset.mem_Icc]
    · exact ha
    · exact ⟨hb, by linarith [ha.2]⟩
    · exact ⟨by linarith [ha.1], hc⟩

  have h_sq : ∀ x ∈ ({a, b, c} : Finset ℕ), ∀ y ∈ ({a, b, c} : Finset ℕ), x ≠ y → IsSquare (x + y) := by
    intros x hx y hy hxy
    simp at hx hy
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl <;> rcases hy with rfl | rfl | rfl
    any_goals contradiction
    all_goals
      dsimp [a, b, c]
      try { use 2 * k - 1; zify [hk]; ring_nf; nlinarith }
      try { use 2 * k; zify; ring }
      try { use 2 * k + 1; zify; ring }

  let T : Finset ℕ := {a, b, c}
  let ST := S ∩ T
  let ScT := (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S) ∩ T
  
  have h_part : ST.card + ScT.card = 3 := by
    have hT : T.card = 3 := by
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem, Finset.card_singleton]
      · simp [h_distinct.2.1]
      · simp [h_distinct.1, h_distinct.2.2]
    have h_disj : Disjoint ST ScT := by
      rw [Finset.disjoint_iff_ne]
      intros x hx y hy
      simp [ST, ScT] at hx hy
      intro eq; rw [eq] at hx; exact hy.1.2 hx.1
    rw [←Finset.card_union_of_disjoint h_disj, ←hT]
    congr; ext x; simp [ST, ScT, T]
    by_cases h : x ∈ S <;> simp [h]
    · exact fun hT => Or.inl ⟨h, hT⟩
    · intro hT; right; constructor; apply Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr; exact ⟨h_range hT, h⟩; exact hT

  cases Nat.le_or_le 2 ST.card with
  | inl h =>
    left
    rcases Finset.one_lt_card.mp h with ⟨u, hu, v, hv, huv⟩
    simp [ST] at hu hv
    exact ⟨u, hu.1, v, hv.1, huv, h_sq u hu.2 v hv.2 huv⟩
  | inr h =>
    right
    rcases Finset.one_lt_card.mp h with ⟨u, hu, v, hv, huv⟩
    simp [ScT] at hu hv
    exact ⟨u, hu.1.1, v, hv.1.1, huv, h_sq u hu.2 v hv.2 huv⟩

let k := Nat.sqrt (n + 1) - 1
  have hk : 9 ≤ k := by
    have : 100 ≤ n := hn
    rw [← Nat.lt_succ_iff, Nat.sub_lt_iff_lt_add (Nat.sqrt_pos_of_pos (n.lt_succ_of_le hn.le))]
    apply Nat.lt_of_pow_lt_pow (n := 2) (by norm_num)
    rw [Nat.sq_sqrt]
    linarith
  let x := 2 * k ^ 2 + 1
  let y := 2 * k ^ 2 - 4 * k
  let z := 2 * k ^ 2 + 4 * k
  let T : Finset ℕ := {x, y, z}
  have hT_subset : T ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    intro a ha
    simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at ha
    have h1 : k ^ 2 + 2 * k ≤ n := by
      have := Nat.sq_sqrt_le (n + 1); zify at this ⊢; nlinarith
    have h2 : n ≤ 2 * k ^ 2 - 4 * k := by
      have := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.sq_sqrt_le (n + 1)) (Nat.pow_lt_pow_succ (by norm_num) (n.lt_succ_of_le hn.le))
      zify at this ⊢; nlinarith
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]
    rcases ha with rfl | rfl | rfl <;> constructor <;> zify at h1 h2 ⊢ <;> nlinarith
  have h_ne : x ≠ y ∧ y ≠ z ∧ x ≠ z := by zify; constructor <;> constructor <;> linarith
  have h_sq : ∀ a ∈ T, ∀ b ∈ T, a ≠ b → IsSquare (a + b) := by
    intros a ha b hb hab
    simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at ha hb
    have e1 : y + x = (2 * k - 1) ^ 2 := by zify; ring
    have e2 : y + z = (2 * k) ^ 2 := by zify; ring
    have e3 : x + z = (2 * k + 1) ^ 2 := by zify; ring
    rcases ha with rfl | rfl | rfl <;> rcases hb with rfl | rfl | rfl
    all_goals try contradiction
    · use 2 * k - 1; rw [add_comm, e1]
    · use 2 * k + 1; rw [add_comm, e3]
    · use 2 * k - 1; rw [e1]
    · use 2 * k; rw [e2]
    · use 2 * k + 1; rw [e3]
    · use 2 * k; rw [add_comm, e2]
  by_cases h : ∃ a ∈ S ∩ T, ∃ b ∈ S ∩ T, a ≠ b
  · obtain ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab⟩ := h
    left; use a, (Finset.mem_inter.1 ha).1, b, (Finset.mem_inter.1 hb).1, hab
    apply h_sq a (Finset.mem_inter.1 ha).2 b (Finset.mem_inter.1 hb).2 hab
  · right
    push_neg at h
    have : (S ∩ T).card ≤ 1 := Finset.card_le_one.2 (λ a ha b hb => by_contra (h a ha b hb))
    have hT : T.card = 3 := by
      simp only [T, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem, Finset.card_singleton, Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton]
      push_neg; rcases h_ne with ⟨h1, h2, h3⟩; exact ⟨⟨h1, h3⟩, h2⟩
    have : (T \ S).card ≥ 2 := by
      rw [Finset.card_sdiff (Finset.inter_subset_right S T), hT]
      linarith
    obtain ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_of_one_lt_card this
    rw [Finset.mem_sdiff] at ha hb
    use a, Finset.mem_sdiff.2 ⟨hT_subset ha.1, ha.2⟩, b, Finset.mem_sdiff.2 ⟨hT_subset hb.1, hb.2⟩, hab
    apply h_sq a ha.1 b hb.1 hab

let f (m : ℕ) := (m ^ 2 - 2 * m - 3) / 2
  let g (m : ℕ) := (m ^ 2 + 6 * m + 5) / 2
  have h_exists : ∃ m, m % 2 = 1 ∧ n ≤ f m := by
    use 2 * n + 1
    constructor; · simp
    dsimp [f]
    apply Nat.le_div_of_mul_le two_pos
    nlinarith
  let k := Nat.find h_exists
  have hk_odd : k % 2 = 1 := (Nat.find_spec h_exists).1
  have h_fk : n ≤ f k := (Nat.find_spec h_exists).2
  have h_k_ge : 15 ≤ k := by
    have : 2 * n ≤ k ^ 2 - 2 * k - 3 := Nat.le_mul_of_div_le two_pos h_fk
    nlinarith [hn]
  have h_gk : g k ≤ 2 * n := by
    have hk_prev : f (k - 2) < n := by
      by_contra h
      have h_odd : (k - 2) % 2 = 1 := by
        have : k ≥ 2 := by linarith
        simp [Nat.sub_mod, hk_odd]
      exact Nat.find_min h_exists (k - 2) (Nat.sub_lt (by linarith) two_pos) ⟨h_odd, h⟩
    have h_ineq : k ^ 2 + 6 * k + 5 ≤ 4 * n := by
      have h_bound : k ^ 2 - 6 * k + 5 < 2 * n := by
        have : (k - 2) ^ 2 - 2 * (k - 2) - 3 = k ^ 2 - 6 * k + 5 := by nlinarith
        have : 2 * f (k - 2) = k ^ 2 - 6 * k + 5 := by
          rw [← this]
          refine Nat.mul_div_cancel' ?_
          have : (k - 2) % 2 = 1 := by
             have : k ≥ 2 := by linarith
             simp [Nat.sub_mod, hk_odd]
          revert this; decide
        linarith [Nat.le_mul_of_div_le two_pos (le_of_lt hk_prev)]
      have h_gap : 12 * k ≤ 2 * n := by
        have : 2 * n ≤ k ^ 2 - 2 * k - 3 := Nat.le_mul_of_div_le two_pos h_fk
        nlinarith [hn]
      linarith
    apply Nat.div_le_of_le_mul h_ineq
  let a := (k ^ 2 + 2 * k + 3) / 2
  let b := f k
  let c := g k
  have h_ab : a + b = k ^ 2 := by
    dsimp [a, b, f]; rw [← Nat.add_div_of_dvd_left, ← Nat.add_div_of_dvd_right]
    · ring_nf; rfl
    · exact two_pos
    · revert hk_odd; decide
    · revert hk_odd; decide
  have h_bc : b + c = (k + 1) ^ 2 := by
    dsimp [b, c, f, g]; rw [← Nat.add_div_of_dvd_left, ← Nat.add_div_of_dvd_right]
    · ring_nf; rfl
    · exact two_pos
    · revert hk_odd; decide
    · revert hk_odd; decide
  have h_ca : c + a = (k + 2) ^ 2 := by
    dsimp [c, a, g]; rw [← Nat.add_div_of_dvd_left, ← Nat.add_div_of_dvd_right]
    · ring_nf; rfl
    · exact two_pos
    · revert hk_odd; decide
    · revert hk_odd; decide
  have h_order : b < a ∧ a < c := by
    dsimp [a, b, c, f, g]; constructor <;> apply Nat.div_lt_of_lt_mul <;> nlinarith
  have h_range : {a, b, c} ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    intro x hx
    simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl
    · constructor <;> try linarith [h_fk]
      apply le_trans (le_of_lt h_order.2) h_gk
    · constructor <;> try linarith [h_fk]
      apply le_trans (le_of_lt h_order.1) (le_trans (le_of_lt h_order.2) h_gk)
    · constructor <;> try linarith [h_fk]
      apply le_trans (le_of_lt h_order.1) (le_trans (le_of_lt h_order.2) h_gk)
  by_contra h_goal
  push_neg at h_goal
  rcases h_goal with ⟨hS_sq, hSc_sq⟩
  let T : Finset ℕ := {a, b, c}
  have hT_card : T.card = 3 := by
    simp [T]; rcases h_order with ⟨h1, h2⟩;
    have : a ≠ b ∧ b ≠ c ∧ a ≠ c := by constructor <;> try constructor <;> linarith
    tauto
  have h_color : (T ∩ S).card ≥ 2 ∨ (T \ S).card ≥ 2 := by
    have : (T ∩ S).card + (T \ S).card = 3 := by
      rw [Finset.card_sdiff (Finset.inter_subset_left), ← Finset.inter_distrib_right,
        Finset.union_compl_self, Finset.inter_univ, hT_card]
    omega
  rcases h_color with h_in | h_out
  · obtain ⟨x, hx, y, hy, hxy⟩ := Finset.one_lt_card.mp h_in
    simp at hx hy
    have h_edge : IsSquare (x + y) := by
      rcases hx.1 with rfl | rfl | rfl <;> rcases hy.1 with rfl | rfl | rfl
      any_goals contradiction
      all_goals (rw [add_comm] <;> simp [h_ab, h_bc, h_ca]; apply IsSquare_sq)
    exact hS_sq x hx.2 y hy.2 hxy h_edge
  · obtain ⟨x, hx, y, hy, hxy⟩ := Finset.one_lt_card.mp h_out
    simp at hx hy
    have h_edge : IsSquare (x + y) := by
      rcases hx.1 with rfl | rfl | rfl <;> rcases hy.1 with rfl | rfl | rfl

    have hy_range : y ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := h_range hy.1
    exact hSc_sq x ⟨hx_range, hx.2⟩ y ⟨hy_range, hy.2⟩ hxy h_edge

let P := fun m => n < m^2 + 2*m

    rw [←this]; exact hm

  have hbc : IsSquare (b + c) := ⟨2*k - 1, by have : 1 ≤ 2*k := by linarith; nlinarith⟩

      rcases hc with ⟨x, hx, y, hy, hxy⟩

      linarith
    rw [Finset.two_le_card_iff] at hTSc
    rcases hTSc with ⟨x, hx, y, hy, hxy⟩
    simp at hx hy
    use x, hx.2, y, hy.2, hxy
    rcases hx.1 with rfl|rfl|rfl <;> rcases hy.1 with rfl|rfl|rfl
    all_goals try (rw [add_comm]; assumption)
    all_goals try assumption
    all_goals (exfalso; nlinarith)

let m := (2 * n + 4).sqrt
  let k := if n ≤ 112 then 17 else if m % 2 = 1 then m + 2 else m + 3
  have hm : m ^ 2 ≤ 2 * n + 4 := Nat.sqrt_le_self _
  have hm' : 2 * n + 4 < (m + 1) ^ 2 := Nat.lt_succ_sqrt _
  have hk_odd : k % 2 = 1 := by
    if h : n ≤ 112 then simp [k, h]
    else simp [k, h]; split_ifs <;> simp [Nat.add_mod]
  have hk_bounds : 2 * n ≤ k ^ 2 - 2 * k - 3 ∧ k ^ 2 + 6 * k + 5 ≤ 4 * n := by
    if h : n ≤ 112 then
      simp [k, h]; constructor <;> omega
    else
      simp [k, h]; split_ifs with h_odd
      · constructor
        · have : (m+1)^2 > 2*n+4 := hm'; nlinarith
        · have : m^2 ≤ 2*n+4 := hm; nlinarith
      · constructor
        · have : (m+1)^2 > 2*n+4 := hm'; nlinarith

  let a := (x^2 + z^2 - y^2) / 2
  let b := (x^2 + y^2 - z^2) / 2
  let c := (y^2 + z^2 - x^2) / 2
  have h_parity : (x^2 + z^2 - y^2) % 2 = 0 ∧ (x^2 + y^2 - z^2) % 2 = 0 ∧ (y^2 + z^2 - x^2) % 2 = 0 := by
    simp [x, y, z, Nat.add_mod, hk_odd]
  have ha : a + b = x^2 := by
    have : x^2 + z^2 - y^2 = 2 * a := Nat.div_mul_cancel h_parity.1
    have : x^2 + y^2 - z^2 = 2 * b := Nat.div_mul_cancel h_parity.2.1
    zify [this] at *; nlinarith
  have hb : b + c = y^2 := by
    have : x^2 + y^2 - z^2 = 2 * b := Nat.div_mul_cancel h_parity.2.1
    have : y^2 + z^2 - x^2 = 2 * c := Nat.div_mul_cancel h_parity.2.2
    zify [this] at *; nlinarith
  have hc : c + a = z^2 := by
    have : y^2 + z^2 - x^2 = 2 * c := Nat.div_mul_cancel h_parity.2.2
    have : x^2 + z^2 - y^2 = 2 * a := Nat.div_mul_cancel h_parity.1
    zify [this] at *; nlinarith
  have h_range : {a, b, c} ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    simp; constructor <;> constructor <;> constructor
    · have := hk_bounds.1; zify at *; nlinarith
    · have := hk_bounds.2; zify at *; nlinarith
    · have := hk_bounds.1; zify at *; nlinarith
    · have := hk_bounds.2; zify at *; nlinarith
    · have := hk_bounds.1; zify at *; nlinarith
    · have := hk_bounds.2; zify at *; nlinarith

  push_neg at h_not
  have h_indep : ∀ u v, u ∈ {a,b,c} → v ∈ {a,b,c} → u ≠ v → (u ∈ S ↔ v ∈ S) → False := by

    · exact h_not.2 u (by simp [h_range hu, hus]) v (by simp [h_range hv, heq, hus]) hne (by rw [←(by aesop : IsSquare (u+v) ↔ IsSquare (a+b) ∨ IsSquare (b+c) ∨ IsSquare (c+a))]; aesop)
  by_cases haS : a ∈ S
  · by_cases hbS : b ∈ S
    · exact h_indep a b (by simp) (by simp) h_distinct.1 (iff_of_true haS hbS)

      · exact h_indep b c (by simp) (by simp) h_distinct.2.1 (iff_of_false hbS hcS)
  · by_cases hbS : b ∈ S

      · exact h_indep c a (by simp) (by simp) h_distinct.2.2 (iff_of_false hcS haS)
